description: Letter from a young man named Sibāʿ, in Alexandria, to his mother, in Fustat, but addressed to his brother Abū l-Najm. In Judaeo-Arabic. The sender who used to teach in the Iraqi synagogue in Fustat. Same sender(s) and addressee(s) as T-S 13J16.10 (PGPID 3252), and discussing some of the same issues, including the episode with paying off the capitation tax officer with two dirhams. See there for the full list of related documents.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאלכסנדריה לפוסטאט. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
